---
title: "Karpathy: Software Is Changing (Again)"
description: "Notes from Karpathy's talk: Software 3.0, LLMs as fallible people spirits, the autonomy slider, and the decade of agents."
author: "synesis"
date: "2025-06-19"
categories: [AI, AGI, agentic systems, talk, video, generative AI, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Watch Karpathy's talk on YouTube. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/LCEmiRjPEtQ)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Andrej Karpathy, former Director of AI and Autopilot Vision at Tesla, co-founding member of OpenAI, and the man who coined "vibe coding", gave a 40min talk on "Software in the Era of AI" [[1]](#ref-1):

- **Software 3.0:** Programming in English.
- LLM is like "fallible people spirits": stochastic simulation of people, or I call "quantum state of personas" (prompting causing wave function collapse).
- "Autonomy slider" to meet LLMs half-way: partial autonomy apps — AI generates suggestions and humans verify them.
- **Build systems for agents:** clean and well-documented APIs for agents; robots.txt → llms.txt.
- Cloud-first and on-device.
- **Vibe coding:** the human role shifts from coder to context-wrangler or orchestrator.
- Comparing current LLM evolution to 60s (mainframe era).
- 2025–2035 will mark the "decade of agents".

---

## References

<a id="ref-1"></a>[1] Karpathy, Andrej. "Software Is Changing (Again)." *YouTube*. <https://youtu.be/LCEmiRjPEtQ>


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_andrej-karpathy-software-is-changing-again-activity-7341514473637146624-ipON).*
